label: 190 Transfer of Plum Island Animal Disease Center, Department of Agriculture

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In accordance with subchapter XII, the Secretary of Agriculture shall transfer to the Secretary of Homeland Security the Plum Island Animal Disease Center of the Department of Agriculture, including the assets and liabilities of the Center.

children.heading: Continued Department of Agriculture access
children.label: b Continued Department of Agriculture access
children.text: On completion of the transfer of the Plum Island Animal Disease Center under subsection (a), the Secretary of Homeland Security and the Secretary of Agriculture shall enter into an agreement to ensure that the Department of Agriculture is able to carry out research, diagnostic, and other activities of the Department of Agriculture at the Center.

children.heading: Direction of activities
children.label: c Direction of activities
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall continue to direct the research, diagnostic, and other activities of the Department of Agriculture at the Center described in subsection (b).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: At least 180 days before any change in the biosafety level at the Plum Island Animal Disease Center, the President shall notify Congress of the change and describe the reasons for the change.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: No change described in paragraph (1) may be made earlier than 180 days after the completion of the transition period (as defined in ).section 541 of this title
